title: FactoryLM CLF Judge Independence v1
description: Classifies how independent a judge (or approval mechanism) is from the interpreter that produced the answer. gold_eligible is DERIVED from promotion-policy.md — only authorized classes may promote a candidate to gold. Provider capability is probed dynamically because serverless availability changes.

independence_class.description: AN-GS-021 = SELF_CONSISTENCY_ONLY (interpreter and judge both MiniMax-M3, the only serverless Together vision lane).

gold_eligible.description: DERIVED by promotion-policy.md, not asserted freely. SELF_CONSISTENCY_ONLY and SAME_MODEL_DIFFERENT_RUN are gold_eligible=false.

confidence_cap.description: policy-imposed ceiling; SELF_CONSISTENCY_ONLY caps confidence and forbids auto-gold
